meaning: v.没有扭紧  vbl.没有扭紧
examples: He had unscrewed the caps most of the way.
She unscrewed the cap of her water bottle and gave him a drink.
He unscrewed the back of the telephone and started connecting it to the cable.
She returned to discover the whole safe containing the jewels had been unscrewed and taken away.
The airline uncorked (or unscrewed for those in Economy) around 1.5 million bottles last year.
